name: Use Case Intake
purpose: Confirm ownership, scope, and minimum business context.

name: Suitability Gate
purpose: Check whether the workflow is appropriate for agentic automation.

name: Risk Classification Gate
purpose: Classify autonomy, impact, sensitivity, reversibility, and required controls.

name: Data Readiness Gate
purpose: Check source quality, freshness, lineage, access control, and context reliability.

name: Governance Gate
purpose: Check approval model, auditability, role boundaries, controls, and escalation.

name: Evaluation Gate
purpose: Check scenario coverage, failure modes, regression tests, and safety tests.

name: Human Approval Gate
purpose: Check whether accountable humans and approval artifacts are present.

name: Pilot Readiness Gate
purpose: Determine whether the use case can proceed to a controlled pilot.

name: Production Readiness Gate
purpose: Determine whether the use case is strong enough for production review.
